title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind is reimagining the mouse pointer with AI-powered capabilities that understand what the pointer is targeting and its contextual significance. The project aims to modernize an interface element that has remained largely unchanged for over fifty years.
